display_name: MRT Station Bombing - Racial Tension Response

crisis_event.description: An explosion at Raffles Place MRT station during morning rush hour. 12 injured, 2 critical. Perpetrator unknown. Social media immediately attributes the attack to a specific ethnic/religious group without evidence.

required_teams.team_description: Monitor social feeds, flag hate speech and misinformation, track sentiment trends
Draft and publish official responses, counter-narratives, and fact-based corrections
Coordinate with community leaders, religious organizations, and grassroots networks
Escalate to authorities, coordinate with police PR, manage inter-agency comms

npc_personas.name: Karen Wong
npc_personas.personality: fearful, amplifies rumors, calls for action

npc_personas.name: TruthSeeker
npc_personas.personality: conspiracy theorist, high follower count, deliberately inflammatory

npc_personas.name: Rev. David Chen
npc_personas.personality: interfaith leader, calls for calm, supportive

npc_personas.name: Fatimah Binte Hassan
npc_personas.personality: scared Muslim mother, worried about backlash against her children at school

npc_personas.name: SG Patriot
npc_personas.personality: ultranationalist, dog-whistle racism, couches hate in patriotism

confirmed_facts: Explosion occurred at 08:42 at Raffles Place MRT
12 people injured, 2 in critical condition at SGH
MRT services suspended on East-West Line between Tanjong Pagar and City Hall
SCDF deployed 5 emergency vehicles to scene
Police have cordoned off the area within 200m radius

unconfirmed_claims.claim: Second bomb found at City Hall MRT
unconfirmed_claims.truth: Area swept and cleared by police

unconfirmed_claims.claim: Attack linked to overseas terrorist group
unconfirmed_claims.truth: Police have not confirmed any links
Circulating video is from a 2019 incident in another country

sop_reference.sop_name: Protocol 3: Racial Incident Social Media Response

steps.name: Activate Monitoring
steps.description: Begin real-time monitoring of all social media platforms for hate speech, misinformation, and inflammatory content

steps.name: Situation Assessment
steps.description: Assess the scale of online hate, identify key narratives, and determine affected communities

steps.name: Fact Verification
steps.description: Cross-reference claims with official sources. Document confirmed facts and debunk false claims

steps.name: Escalate to Leadership
steps.description: Brief leadership on situation, get approval for response strategy

steps.name: Draft Official Response
steps.description: Prepare official counter-narrative addressing key false claims and promoting unity

steps.name: Get Response Approved
steps.description: Submit draft for approval through proper channels

steps.name: Publish Response
steps.description: Publish approved response across all official channels simultaneously

steps.name: Community Engagement
steps.description: Reach out to community leaders for amplification and grassroots calming

steps.name: Monitor Response Impact
steps.description: Track sentiment shift after response, adjust strategy if needed

steps.name: Situation Report
steps.description: Compile situation report with metrics on reach, engagement, and sentiment change

language_sensitivity: avoid associating any ethnic/religious group with the attack
acknowledge community fears without validating hate

inject_templates.template: BREAKING: Explosion reported at Raffles Place MRT. Smoke seen rising from station entrance. Emergency services on scene. #SGBombing #RafflesPlace
BREAKING NEWS: Explosion at Raffles Place MRT station during morning rush hour. At least 12 injured, emergency services responding. Cause under investigation.

delivery_config.headline: Explosion at Raffles Place MRT - Multiple Casualties Reported

inject_templates.template: I KNEW IT. These people come to our country and this is what they do. Send them all back. #SGBombing #DeportThemAll
My children go to school near Raffles Place. Are they safe? I'm so scared people will blame us for this. We had nothing to do with it. Please don't hurt us. #SGBombing

Subject: URGENT - MRT Explosion Social Media Response

Team,

Social media is exploding with racist content targeting the Muslim and South Asian communities following the Raffles Place explosion. We need an immediate coordinated response.

Please activate Protocol 3 (Racial Incident Response) immediately.

Key priorities:
1. Monitor and flag hate speech
2. Verify facts with SPF/SCDF
3. Draft counter-narrative
4. Coordinate with community leaders

I need a situation assessment within 15 minutes.

Regards,
Director, Office of Harmony

THREAD: What they don't want you to know about the Raffles Place bombing. Sources tell me the bomber was a foreign worker from [redacted country]. The government is covering it up. RT if you want the TRUTH. 1/5 #SGBombing #WakeUpSG

Police confirm explosion at Raffles Place MRT was caused by an improvised device. Investigation ongoing. No arrests made. Police urge public not to speculate on social media about the identity of any perpetrator.

delivery_config.headline: Police Confirm Improvised Device Behind Raffles Place MRT Explosion

inject_templates.template: Hi team, I'm seeing a video going viral claiming to show the bomber's face. It's actually footage from a 2019 incident in another country. We need to flag this immediately and prepare a debunk post.

As an interfaith leader, I urge everyone to stay calm and not jump to conclusions. Let the police do their work. Now is the time for unity, not division. Praying for all victims regardless of race or religion. #SGUnited #PrayForSG
Time to take back our country. If the government won't protect us, WE WILL. Rally at Raffles Place tonight 8pm. Real Singaporeans only. #ProtectSG #SGFirst

Subject: RE: MRT Explosion - Community Leader Coordination

Dear Team,

I am Imam Ahmad from Al-Istiqamah Mosque near Raffles Place. Several of our congregation members were caught in the explosion and are receiving treatment. We are receiving threatening messages and our community is frightened.

Please advise on what we should communicate to our members. We want to help calm the situation but need guidance on messaging.

JazakAllah khair,
Imam Ahmad bin Ibrahim
UPDATE: Second suspicious package found at City Hall MRT! Everyone evacuate NOW! This is an organized attack!! #SGBombing #CityHall #Evacuate

content_flags.factual_basis: false - area has been swept and cleared

inject_templates.template: UPDATE: Singapore Police Force confirms NO second device found. City Hall MRT station area has been swept and cleared. Police urge public not to spread unverified information.

delivery_config.headline: Police: No Second Device Found at City Hall MRT - Area Cleared

inject_templates.template: Disgusting to see Singaporeans turning on each other. We are ONE people. The real enemy is whoever planted that bomb, not our neighbors. My Malay neighbor was FIRST to help the injured. THAT is Singapore. #SGUnited #OneNation

escalation_triggers.effect: Virality of hateful posts doubles. 3 new inflammatory posts from high-follower NPCs.
Misinformation spreads to other platforms. Engagement triples on false claims.
NPC journalists question the official response's accuracy. Credibility takes a hit.
Community leaders amplify the message. Supportive posts increase by 30%.
Interfaith coalition issues joint statement. Hate speech drops by 25%.
Rally gains traction. Counter-rally organized. Risk of real-world confrontation escalates.
